message:
feat: window/subquery conformance tests, substr overflow safety, recursive SLT ingestion

Conformance Oracle Tests (fsqlite-core/connection.rs):
- Add test_conformance_window_functions_basic: 14-query oracle test
  covering ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, partitioned ROW_NUMBER,
  running SUM, AVG OVER, COUNT OVER, MIN/MAX OVER, LAG, LEAD,
  FIRST_VALUE, LAST_VALUE with RANGE frame, NTILE, and SUM with
  ROWS BETWEEN frame
- Add test_conformance_correlated_subqueries: oracle tests for
  correlated subqueries in SELECT, WHERE, and HAVING clauses

Prepared Statement Index Test (fsqlite/lib.rs):
- Add prepared_indexed_equality_explain_uses_duplicate_run_probe:
  validates that prepared statements with indexed equality produce
  correct EXPLAIN output (SeekGE, IdxRowid, SeekRowid) and return
  correct results when bound with parameters

substr() Overflow Safety (fsqlite-func/builtins.rs):
- Replace all arithmetic in SubstrFunc (both text and blob paths) with
  saturating operations: saturating_add for p1+len, p2+p1 adjustments;
  saturating_sub for p1-p2 backward shift; saturating_add for p1+p2>len
  bounds check. Prevents i64 overflow on pathological inputs like
  substr(x, i64::MIN, i64::MAX).

Recursive SLT Ingestion (fsqlite-harness/corpus_ingest.rs):
- Replace flat read_dir with recursive collect_slt_suite_files() that
  descends into subdirectories, enabling ingestion of hierarchically
  organized SLT suites (e.g., sqllogictest/test/index/ subtrees)
- Use strip_prefix for fixture naming so nested files get descriptive
  names like "subdir/test.slt" instead of just "test.slt"
- Sort files by full path for deterministic ingestion order

B-Tree Invariant Tests (fsqlite-btree/btree_invariant_tests.rs):
- Include missing elements in panic message for easier debugging

Oracle comment formatting fix (oracle.rs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
